brief: Germany's CDU chair resigns over surrogacy hypocrisy, New York mayor considers Netanyahu arrest, US continues airstrikes on Iran for seventh night, and wildfires cause air quality warnings across the US.
news_summary: Jens Spahn resigned after using surrogacy despite his party's opposition; Zohran Mamdani signals possible arrest of Netanyahu; US strikes hit Iran as wildfires blanket the US with smoke.
papers_summary: Research explores AI's role in writing, from ChatGPT's effect on personal statements to AI coding agents' security risks, alongside studies on scientific visualization literacy and human-robot juggling.

en.brief: Germany's CDU chair resigns over surrogacy hypocrisy, New York mayor considers Netanyahu arrest, US continues airstrikes on Iran for seventh night, and wildfires cause air quality warnings across the US.
en.news_summary: Jens Spahn resigned after using surrogacy despite his party's opposition; Zohran Mamdani signals possible arrest of Netanyahu; US strikes hit Iran as wildfires blanket the US with smoke.
en.papers_summary: Research explores AI's role in writing, from ChatGPT's effect on personal statements to AI coding agents' security risks, alongside studies on scientific visualization literacy and human-robot juggling.

zh.brief: 世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙備受關注，同時月經追蹤App隱私漏洞引發擔憂。學術方面，研究探討書寫過程與AI影響。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽阿根廷與西班牙爭冠，獎金創歷史新高；月經週期追蹤App數據洩露風險引發討論；梅西與馬拉多納、貝利誰是史上最佳成話題。
zh.papers_summary: 近期研究聚焦二語寫作中的複雜名詞短語發展、ChatGPT對個人陳述的影響，以及多模態大型語言模型對科學可視化理解的評估。

todays_image.caption: Both the soccer game and the surrogacy story involve a controversial "assist" that leads to a goal—whether scoring a win or becoming a parent—but ultimately results in the player leaving the field.
todays_image.title: Soccer Game
